§ 01Closed Deal Summary

Dear {{brokerName}},

We are pleased to share that the {{industry}} transaction you referred has successfully closed. The company is now 100% employee-owned through an ESOP, and the seller has achieved their financial and legacy objectives.

A.Industry: {{industry}}
B.EBITDA range: {{ebitdaRange}}
C.Employee count: {{employeeCount}}
D.Ownership transferred: 100% to ESOP trust
E.Deal structure: {{dealStructure}}
F.Timeline achieved: {{timelineDays}} days from engagement to close
Anonymized: This summary omits the company name and specific financial figures to protect the seller's confidentiality.
§ 02Outcome Highlights

This transaction delivered strong outcomes across every dimension that matters:

1.Closing timeline: Closed within {{timelineVariance}} of the original estimate provided at LOI stage
2.Seller proceeds: {{sellerProceeds}} at closing, with additional payments over the seller note term
3.Employee ownership: 100% employee-owned — all eligible employees participate at no cost
4.Employee retention: {{retentionRate}} key employee retention through the transition period
5.Tax efficiency: Seller elected §1042 rollover, deferring capital gains on {{1042Amount}}
6.Company continuity: All customer relationships, vendor contracts, and operations preserved
§ 03Testimonial Request

As someone who refers business owners to us, your perspective on the ESOP process carries real weight. A brief testimonial from you would help other brokers understand the value of employee ownership transactions and the experience of working with Forhemit.

If you are willing, we would appreciate a short statement covering:

A.Your experience referring this deal to Forhemit
B.How the process compared to a traditional M&A transaction
C.Any outcomes that stood out — timeline, seller satisfaction, or commission protection
Permission levels: You may choose (1) anonymous quote only, (2) first name and brokerage, or (3) full attribution. We will never publish without your written approval.

Please reply to this email with your testimonial or let us know if you would prefer a brief phone call to discuss.

§ 04Referral Program

We value your referrals and want to make it easy to send us qualified leads. Here is our current referral structure:

A.Referral fee: {{referralFeePercent}} of Forhemit's gross fee, paid at closing
B.Deal criteria: Owner-operated, $2M+ EBITDA, 20+ employees, owner seeking liquidity and legacy
C.How to submit: Email deals@forhemit.com with the owner's name, company, and EBITDA range
D.Response time: We will respond within 24 hours with a preliminary qualification
E.Your role: You maintain your broker relationship — we work around you, not through you
No exclusivity required: You can refer to us alongside other exit paths. We compete on process, not on locking you in.
§ 05Contact

For referrals, questions, or to discuss a potential deal:

{{contactName}}, {{contactTitle}}
